heading: Today
text: A few early clouds, a few flurries northeast, otherwise sunshine, mixing with increasing afternoon clouds.  Highs 30s to low 40s.  Winds light, becoming southwest 5 to 15 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Becoming mostly cloudy north, with a few snow showers or flurries from the Adirondacks and Rt. 2 north.  Evening clouds south, becoming partly cloudy.  Lows 20 to 25 north, in the 20s to near 30 south.  Winds west 10 to 15 mph, diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Wednesday
text: A few morning snow showers from the Adirondacks and Rt. 2 north, then variable clouds and sun.  Morning sun south, mixing with clouds.  Highs in the upper 30s to low 40s north, 40s to near 50 south.  Light winds becoming south 5 to 15 mph.
